title: Allosaurus Stalking Prey Coloring Page
seoTitle: Allosaurus Stalking Prey Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Clean line-art depiction of an Allosaurus predator navigating through prehistoric ferns. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Allosaurus Stalking Prey was a massive carnivorous dinosaur that lived during the Late Jurassic period, around 155 to 145 million years ago.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing intricate color highlighting using dual-brush markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about prehistoric animal anatomy while developing fine motor coordination.
